name: @tank/notion
description: Query, create, and update Notion pages, databases, and blocks through the Notion API. Covers database CRUD with typed properties (select, relation, rollup, formula), compound filters, page content as block trees, search across workspaces, and pagination patterns. Sources: Notion API official docs. Triggers: notion, database, page, block, query, filter, property, relation, rollup, block tree, Notion API, workspace, toggle, callout, create page, update page.
